info.english_meaning: to hate to try to hurt
info.hindI_arTa: dveza karanA mArane ke lie prayatna karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'BrAtre paretAya vidudruhe yaH' (BA0 pu0 3141) droho'pakArabudDiH BrAtaramakadarTayad ityarTaH pratiBAti caturTyAtmanepadaM cetyuBayamasTAne
'aBidrugDA pare cenno BetavyaM parantapa' (BA0 u0 5518) aBidrugDA jiGAMsitA drohavizayaM nItAH
'mayA pUnareBya evABidrugDamajYena' (uttara0 6) ukto'rTaH caturTI tu duruktA dvitIyA tu yuktA
